title: Оptimized Vanilla +
description: Оptimized Vanilla Plus - the best build of mods for survival in minecraft in a single world and on servers
body:
### **Оptimized Vanilla Plus** - the best build of mods for survival in minecraft in a single world and on servers.

In this assembly you will find mods for survival on multiplayer servers or survival alone. All mods are selected to optimize Minecraft, but there are mods like PlasmoVoice for playing on servers. If desired, unnecessary mods can be disabled. **This build is compatible with any launcher**.

_Plasmovoice is included in the modpack because it is used on many vanilla servers. You can delete or disable it in your launcher._

You can leave your wishes using this [link](https://github.com/larttop/optimizedvanillaplus/issues). We will review all your suggestions!

![New World Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e58d39f8e0c1a8f14beb379f54b16f688891a1.png)
